message:
fix(invariant): add FINALIZING admission tests and fix stale model-check comments

invariant: Add two new lifecycle legality tests verifying that FINALIZING
regions admit task work (can_accept_work) while rejecting strict admission
(can_spawn), and that CLOSING/DRAINING reject both. This closes the
invariant coverage gap for the FINALIZING cleanup-task spawn change.

model-check: Update Invariant 5 comment to clarify that asx_region_can_spawn
gates strict OPEN-only admission (obligations, child regions), not task
spawning which now uses asx_region_can_accept_work. bd-wjex closed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
